description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and a mix of brick and light-colored exterior walls. The property features a well-maintained front yard with trees and shrubs, a driveway leading to a garage, and a visible porch area. The backyard includes a patio with outdoor seating, a small pool, and a greenhouse structure. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern on the front facade, with additional windows on the sides and rear for ample natural light. The landscaping is lush, with a combination of grass, paved walkways, and decorative plants. The overall design is compact yet spacious, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, brick and light exterior, landscaped yard, porch, garage, and backyard amenities including a pool and greenhouse.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and greenhouse.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pool, greenhouse, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full width of the house, backyard, and side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
